slides.title: Competitive Intelligence, Reimagined
slides.subtitle: AI-Powered Intelligence for Zurn Elkay
slides.speaker_notes: Welcome the audience. Set context that this is a custom-built solution for Zurn Elkay's unique multi-BU structure.

slides.title: Three Challenges We Heard

challenge_1.title: Time
challenge_1.description: CI analysts spend weeks manually gathering quarterly data across 5 business units

challenge_2.title: Consistency
challenge_2.description: Each BU does CI differently, making enterprise roll-ups difficult and time-consuming

challenge_3.title: Coordination Blindspots
challenge_3.description: Missing when competitors like Watts or Morris Group make coordinated moves across their portfolios

slides.speaker_notes: Pause after each challenge. These came directly from our discovery sessions. Ask if anything has changed.

slides.title: Our Solution: 7 Specialized AI Agents

content.headline: Purpose-built for Zurn Elkay's structure
content.key_point: Not a generic tool - knows YOUR competitors, categories, and parent companies

slides.speaker_notes: Emphasize this is custom, not off-the-shelf. Transition to architecture slide.

slides.title: System Architecture

level_0.name: CI Orchestrator
level_0.role: Quality assurance, workflow management, error handling

slides.speaker_notes: Walk through each level. Explain why hierarchy matters - BU experts feed into enterprise view.

slides.title: Parent Company Tracking

content.headline: See coordinated moves you're missing today

companies.name: Watts Water Technologies
companies.insight: Coordinated digital platform investment across brands

companies.name: Morris Group
companies.insight: Just Mfg + T&S bundled healthcare solutions

slides.speaker_notes: This is the 'aha' moment for most audiences. They're competing against portfolios, not products.

slides.title: Confidence Calibration

content.headline: Know exactly how much to trust each insight

levels.meaning: Verified against official databases (NSF, FDA) or multiple sources
Single reliable trade publication or press release

content.key_point: Third-party sources prioritized over company PR

slides.speaker_notes: Executives love this. It's honest about what we know vs. what we're inferring.

slides.title: What You'll See Today

demos.title: BU Deep Dive
demos.description: Drains quarterly analysis with output walkthrough

slides.speaker_notes: Set expectations for the demo. Ask which areas are most interesting.

slides.title: Business Value Summary

value_props.improvement: Automated data gathering with human review

slides.speaker_notes: Tie back to the three challenges from the opening. Show how each is addressed.

slides.title: Deployment Options

tiers.use_case: Complete automation with QA and scheduling

slides.speaker_notes: Most customers start with Core or Plus, then expand. Enterprise includes orchestration.

slides.title: Next Steps

steps.title: Next Week
steps.description: Technical deep-dive with your IT/Data team

steps.title: 30 Days
steps.description: Pilot deployment with 1-2 BUs and real data

slides.speaker_notes: Be specific about timeline. Ask about decision-makers and budget cycles.

slides.title: Questions?
slides.speaker_notes: Open for questions. Have backup slides ready for technical deep-dives.

backup_slides.title: Technical Architecture Detail
backup_slides.content: Detailed Python implementation, Azure Functions, API structure

backup_slides.title: Integration Options
backup_slides.content: Power BI, Salesforce, SharePoint, Data Warehouse connectors

backup_slides.title: Security & Compliance
backup_slides.content: Data handling, access controls, audit trails

backup_slides.title: Future Enhancements
backup_slides.content: Real-time alerts, additional data sources, mobile app
